channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: 斯塔默称英国不会被卷入“更广泛战争”
item.description: Comment from British prime minister comes as German government warns of danger of ‘never-ending’ conflict

item.title: 介绍Postgres终端界面客户端pgtui
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/mbljtb/introducing_pgtui_postgres_tui_client">Comments</a></p>

item.title: 法国公民在阿塞拜疆因间谍罪被判10年监禁
item.description: Martin Ryan was accused of collecting secret information about Baku's military co-operation with Turkey and Pakistan.

item.title: 股市期货因霍尔木兹海峡希望油价下跌而走高
item.description: US stock futures rose and oil prices reversed an advance on hopes that more tankers will be able to traverse the Strait of Hormuz, with talks ongoing to ensure the waterway’s security.

item.title: 肖恩·潘暂别奥斯卡，访问乌克兰
item.description: The actor, who did not attend the ceremony to receive his award for best supporting actor for his role in ‘One Battle After Another,’ instead decided to travel to Europe, according to The New York Tim

item.title: 散户从私募信贷金矿撤资数十亿
item.description: Flood of redemptions threatens to stall one of Wall Street’s most important sources of growth

item.title: 油价飙升拖累旅游前景，加勒比债券走低
item.description: A surge in oil prices triggered by the war in Iran is rippling through sovereign debt markets in Central America and the Caribbean, where economies that depend heavily on tourism are particularly vuln

item.title: 斯塔默宣布5300万英镑援助 缓解燃油取暖成本
item.description: The money will be for "vulnerable" households who have faced a sharp rise in energy bills since the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran.

item.title: 无醇啤酒与宠物美容被用于衡量通胀
item.description: Houmous and motorhomes are also added to the basket of goods and services used to chart the rising cost of living.

item.title: 厄瓜多尔部署7.5万军警打击贩毒集团
item.description: Citizens of the most violent-wracked provinces have been warned the government is "at war" with the gangs.

item.title: 零跑与Stellantis联盟扩展并首度盈利
item.description: Chinese electric carmaker Zhejiang Leapmotor Technology Co. posted its first annual profit on strong vehicle sales as it expands its partnership with Stellantis NV.

item.title: 阿尔维斯“赠送”三席予社工党并三重打击阿巴斯卡尔
item.description: Se Acabó La Fiesta no alcanza representación, pero suma en tres provincias más que la distancia entre los de Abascal y Sánchez Leer

item.title: 缅甸亲军方政党主导的议会五年后复会
item.description: New parliament opens for the first time since the 2021 coup after elections that excluded major opposition parties.

item.title: 英国清洁能源目标推进受阻
item.description: Our economy remains highly fossil fuel-dependent partly because we are not electrifying in the desired way

item.title: 内塔尼亚胡对手竞相对伊朗示强
item.description: Israel’s opposition parties criticise PM’s management of war even if they express strong support for offensive

item.title: 德黑兰居民称伊朗正采取措施防抗议
item.description: Residents describe new security checkpoints around the capital, where they say people are stopped and searched.

item.title: 乌克兰打响金融前线紧急战役
item.description: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.

item.title: 摘要：AI如何用于军事瞄准，及五角大楼对Claude的战争
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Defense official reveals how AI chatbots coul

item.title: 企业雇24岁以下失业者可得3000英镑补贴
item.description: It comes as ministers grapple with spiralling unemployment rates among young people.

item.title: 南非警方：举报人谋杀案嫌疑人为前精英军官
item.description: Marius van der Merwe was shot dead three weeks after accusing police officers of killing a robbery suspect.

item.title: 摩根大通启动57.5亿美元EA收购关联贷款出售
item.description: Wall Street banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. have kicked off a $5.75 billion cross-border leveraged loan sale to help finance the buyout of video game maker Electronic Arts Inc., one of the large

item.title: 钢厂日耗130万英镑运营成本
item.description: The government spent £377m to keep British Steel's Scunthorpe site operating, according to a report.

item.title: 吹哨人称TikTok与Meta为算法竞赛漠视安全
item.description: Companies allowed more harmful content on user’s feeds, knowing their algorithms ran on outrage, BBC hears.

item.title: 印度医院ICU火灾致十人死亡
item.description: All the victims of the fire in Odisha state are patients, and 11 hospital staff are being treated for burns.

item.title: 美国团体如何驱动英国新一代反堕胎运动
item.description: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?

item.title: Nebius与Meta签270亿美元基建协议 股价涨14%
item.description: Meta is planning capital expenditure of up to $135 billion related to AI this year.

item.title: 纸币、海狸与一场典型的英国式抵制
item.description: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.

item.title: 探究AI在某些游戏中受困的原因
item.description: When winning depends on intuiting a mathematical function, AIs come up short.

item.title: 沃尔玛支持的PhonePe因市场动荡暂缓IPO
item.description: PhonePe has paused its planned IPO, delaying a major liquidity event for investors including Tiger Global and Microsoft.

item.title: 欧洲称必须重新武装 但目的何在？
item.description: With the Middle East ablaze and war in Ukraine showing no sign of respite, a stark new consensus is hardening in Paris, London and Berlin that Europe must rearm. Recently, French President Emmanuel Ma
